conditions.name: Asthma
conditions.summary: Chronic inflammatory airway disease with reversible airflow obstruction.
learningGoals: Recognize the major patterns of asthma presentation.

sections.title: Asthma overview
sections.content: Asthma is a chronic inflammatory airway disorder with variable, often reversible airflow obstruction.

quizzes.question: Which pattern best matches asthma on pulmonary function testing?
quizzes.explanation: Asthma is an obstructive disease, so FEV1 and FEV1/FVC are reduced.
